title: T-016 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/start endpoint (no allergen gate yet)
prompt:
# T-016 — POST /work-orders/:id/start endpoint

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.1 FR-08-E1-001, §8.2.1, §10.1

## Goal
Implement Next.js App Router route handler POST /api/production/work-orders/[id]/start performing READY→IN_PROGRESS transition per wo_state_machine_v1, R14 idempotency, R14 transaction_id, allergen-gate placeholder returning false (allergen wired in T-055).

## Implementation contract
Create apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/start/route.ts. POST body validated by zod schema {transaction_id: uuid, operator_id: uuid, line_id: string, shift_id: string}. Wrap handler in withIdempotency. Inside transaction: load WO, assert status IN ('DRAFT','READY'), evaluate guards from §10.1 (operator_authenticated, line_available; allergen_changeover_gate_v1_passes_or_not_required hardcoded TRUE for now — TODO T-055 will wire), UPDATE work_orders.status='IN_PROGRESS', INSERT wo_executions row with started_at=now, started_by, current_operator_id. Emit outbox event 'production.wo.started' (skipped here — wired in T-041). Return 200 {wo_id, status, started_at, allergen_gate_required: false}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/start/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/start/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/start-wo.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given WO status='READY', when POST /start called with valid body, then 200 with status=IN_PROGRESS, wo_executions row created with started_at, work_orders.status updated
2. Given WO status='COMPLETED', when POST /start called, then 409 Conflict with error code 'invalid_state_transition' (per §10.1 wo_state_machine_v1)
3. Given same transaction_id replayed within 1h, when POST /start called twice, then second returns identical 200 body and no duplicate wo_executions row

## Test strategy
- RED: write route test asserting 200 happy path + 409 wrong state + idempotent replay before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*start'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip transaction_id validation (R14)
- Do not perform transition without DB transaction
- Do not implement allergen gate evaluation here (delegated to T-055)

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /work-orders/:id/start route handler performing READY→IN_PROGRESS with R14 idempotency.

Return §8.2.1 success body. 409 on invalid state per state machine. Outbox emit deferred to T-041 (TODO marker but no placeholder text in body).
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen gate evaluation (T-055 wires)
Do not implement outbox emit (T-041 wires)
Do not implement other WO transition endpoints
